text: Make Aimparency publishable as a local-first open source project
description: Release Aimparency as a local service that runs on the user's computer, exposes a browser UI, and connects to local projects with a .bowman directory. Success means a new user can clone the repo, install dependencies, understand the project from the docs, run it locally, and use it against nearby repositories without any hosted dependency.

status.comment: Execution umbrella for the local-first open source release.
